title: Core build: scaffold, mock-ChatGPT fixture, browser layer, ask_chatgpt()->text, UC1 acceptance
objective: uv Python project in this repo where ask_chatgpt(prompt, session_identifier=..., model_settings=...) -> str works end-to-end against a local loopback mock-ChatGPT fixture, automated acceptance green, ZERO chatgpt.com contact. Real-channel code paths built but NEVER tested (operator-runbook-proven later).

binding_decisions.D-001: DOM-primary bounded reader + copy-button fallback behind one ResponseReader interface (configurable order, DOM default). Bundles: download-capture primary + checksummed fenced-base64url fallback (M-003 scope; fixture must support affordances NOW). Level B survivals: loopback-only tests, selector maps as data, fail-closed selectors, adversarial fixtures, no credential reads, no history sweep.

constraints: Automated tests NEVER contact chatgpt.com/openai; mock binds 127.0.0.1 only, EPHEMERAL ports (bind 0).
Chromium ALREADY cached at ~/.cache/ms-playwright/chromium-1223 — no download; report BLOCKED if launch fails (no sudo/apt).
Never read/store/log credentials/cookies/session tokens/profile contents; real-channel path takes a profile DIR PATH only, never inspects contents.
Write only inside /home/abhmul/dev/ask-chatgpt (+ tmp/). Archive weak-simplex-conjecture is READ-ONLY (never archive/ or human/).
uv run from repo root ONLY (this repo's own venv); never bare python/pip; never the shared agent venv; uv sync --all-groups ALWAYS.
Serialize pytest + editing legs (one editor at a time in shared tree). Never git push. Manager commits green slices (workers do not commit).
Telemetry v2: derive ACTUAL from .pi-workers/<run>/metadata.txt started_at + report END_TIMESTAMP/mtimes, NEVER worker minute self-reports (hallucinated ~15x).

worker_mechanics.dispatch: bash .claude/skills/orchestration/references/pi-worker-watch.sh "<task pointer>"  (FOREGROUND, --wait-seconds 540, Bash timeout 600000; re-invoke --watch <run-dir> until status file exists)
worker_mechanics.editing_legs: SERIALIZE (one editor); only T8 doc may overlap one editing leg (disjoint files, no pytest)
worker_mechanics.pi_shared_account: if pi launches throttle/fail oddly, drop to 1 concurrent and note in handoff

legs.title: scaffold: pyproject(src/ask_chatgpt), dev group pytest+playwright, uv sync --all-groups, socket-guard conftest, REAL chromium-vs-loopback smoke, green pytest
legs.result: exit0; 2 passed incl real chromium-vs-loopback smoke; files verified on disk. greenlet/tmp landmine fixed in T2. Committed with T2 as first slice.
legs.issue: RESOLVED in T2: greenlet now via PyPI in uv.lock, pyproject has no tmp/ refs.

legs.title: errors module (named actionable error types) + session registry (JSON store, path overridable). Pure python, TDD
legs.result: exit0; 9 passed; greenlet landmine REMOVED (pyproject clean, greenlet via PyPI in uv.lock, reproducible); 8 named error classes present; SessionRegistry+ConversationRef with atomic JSON persistence, overridable store path, tmp_path tests. Committed with T1 as first slice.

legs.title: fixture core: loopback HTTP server (ephemeral), conversations by stable ref, composer/send, latest-assistant-turn render + completion marker, reset/inspect endpoints, mock selector-map JSON. TDD
legs.result: exit0; 12 passed. tests/fixtures/mock_chatgpt/server.py (stdlib ThreadingHTTPServer, 127.0.0.1:0 ephemeral, explicit non-loopback guard), control endpoints /__reset__ /__inspect__ /__script__, mock_chatgpt pytest fixture w/ clean teardown. src/ask_chatgpt/selector_maps/mock.json keys match DOM (proven by Playwright drive test). Completion marker [data-testid=assistant-turn-complete], streaming [data-testid=assistant-streaming]. CORE renders complete immediately; __script__ stores streaming/complete/failure fields for T4.

legs.title: fixture reader-facing: adversarial booby-traps + older turns + prompt echoes, virtualized/unstable variant, true streaming, ALL honest-failure states (login/session-not-found/model-unavailable/truncated/rate-limited/selector-unavailable/upload+download-unsupported), copy-button+clipboard (+failure variants), scriptable /__script__ extension. TDD. UC1-critical
legs.result: exit0; 23 passed (12 core intact + 11 new, TDD 11 red->green). server.py->914 lines. Modes: copy_mode(ok/missing/wrong/stale/truncated), streaming+stream_reads (deterministic streaming->complete flip), layout_variant=virtualized, failure modes login_required/session_not_found/model_unavailable/response_truncated/rate_limited/selector_unavailable. New selector keys: copy_button/login_wall/conversation_not_found/truncation_marker/rate_limit_marker/model_option_disabled. Booby-trap latest-turn-uniqueness test present. rate_limited has no named-error type yet -> T5 maps (base error or new subclass).

legs.title: fixture bundle-facing affordances (M-003 consumes; required deliverable NOW): download artifact card serving real zip bytes w/ Content-Disposition (+missing/delayed/wrong/corrupt/truncated/collision/unsupported variants), fenced-base64url payload (BEGIN/END+manifest+bytecount+SHA256, +missing-end/bad-hash/oversized variants), upload <input type=file> recording metadata (+unsupported/size-type-reject/corrupt). Selector keys download_artifact/upload_input. TDD

driver core: Playwright session controller (channel mock/real), selector-map loader (fail-closed -> named error), completion detector, open-or-create conversation, model selection. Real path built NEVER tested. TDD vs fixture

readers: ResponseReader interface; DomReader (latest completed turn only, truncation/end-marker) PRIMARY; CopyButtonReader FALLBACK; order configurable, D-001 default. Must pass adversarial fixtures (booby-trap never returned). TDD
ask_chatgpt() integration + UC1 E2E tests + scripts/accept_uc1.sh + network-guard completion (Playwright route interception + deliberate-violation demo). TDD
observation runbook doc docs/runbooks/observe-chatgpt-unknowns.md from memo section 7 verbatim. NON-EDITING source; may overlap one editing leg
legs.result: exit0; 362-line docs/runbooks/observe-chatgpt-unknowns.md covering all 10 memo-section-7 unknowns (What to observe/How manually/What to record/Gotchas each) + strong consent+credential-safety preamble + M-003-consumable results template. Ran CONCURRENTLY with T3 (disjoint files, no collision). Touched no src/tests/pyproject.

legs.title: INDEPENDENT verification (non-producer): authoritative fresh uv sync --all-groups + full pytest + accept_uc1.sh, inspect artifacts (not exit codes), confirm network guard trips on violation, D-001 conformance. resume_instructions: Re-read orchestration/tasks/MISSION-002.md, this state file, and the latest report in orchestration/reports/M-002/. current_leg names the in-flight leg; its run_dir (if set) is a .pi-workers dir — check its status file. PENDING legs not yet dispatched. Dispatch the next PENDING leg whose deps are all DONE via pi-worker-watch.sh. Editing legs serialize. After T9 PASS, write orchestration/handoffs/MISSION-002-handoff.json and commit. NEVER end turn with a worker running or deliverables unwritten.
